room_start.description:
Dust motes dance in the shafts of afternoon sunlight streaming through a massive bay window, which reveals a perfectly manicured English garden outside. The room is lined from floor to ceiling with leather-bound volumes. A heavy mahogany desk sits in the center, topped with an archaic desktop computer.
